LAW AND MOTION, 302, THERE WAS NO HEARING. TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PETITIONER KEVIN WILLIAMS' WRIT OF MANDATE TO REVIEW ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION IS DENIED. THE COURT HAS CONSIDERED THE MERITS OF THE PETITION AND FINDS THAT THE ADMINISTRATIVE LAW JUDGE'S DECISION IS SUPPORTED BY SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER FOR JUDGE PATRICK J. MAHONEY'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-30-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

Notice Of Motion For Hearingfor Writ Of Mandate To Review Administative Decision
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
No appearance made by the petitioner/moving party
Adelmise Roseme Warner, Deputy City Attorney, (415)554-3930, for respondent/moving party, City and County of San Francisco Retirement System

There was no hearing. Tentative ruling was adopted. PETITIONER KEVIN WILLIAMS' Writ Of Mandate To Review Administative Decision IS DENIED. THE COURT HAS CONSIDERED THE MERITS OF THE PETITION AND FINDS THAT THE ADMINISTRATIVE LAW JUDGE'S DECISION IS SUPPORTED BY SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. Prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order for Judge Patrick J. Mahoney's signature. (302/PJB/AP) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
